changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO variable_types (id, code, name, relation) VALUES (24, 'EBIDTA', 'EBIDTA', 'QUANT_METRIC') , (25, 'DEBT', 'Debt', 'QUANT_METRIC') , (26, 'PENSION_DEBT', 'Pension Debt', 'QUANT_METRIC') , (27, 'GROSS_RISK_BEARING_CAPACITY', 'Gross Risk Bearing Capacity', 'QUANT_METRIC') , (28, 'REVENUE', 'Revenue', 'QUANT_METRIC') ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET code = excluded.code, name = excluded.name, relation = excluded.relation;;
